7. Count the remainder from Sunday onwards and it should
give the weekday of birth of the native. lf it does not match
make the necessary correction in BT to make it happen. Thus
the formula is-
Take the remainder of (BT vikhati x 3)/7 =Weekday of
birth (when counted from Sunday)
As per this method, the astrologer should be able to tell
the weekday of birth from the Khati-vikhati of birth time itself.
If the weekday determined thus, does not match with actual
weekday of birth, make necessary correction to make it
happen. Maximum correction we can make using this method
is, 7/2 = 3.5 vikhati = 3.5 x 24 sec= 72 seconds= 1 min 12
seconds.
Demerits of weekday method
1) It helps us to do a correction of maximum I min 12 seconds
only.
2) Neither theoretical nor logical foundation of this method
is clear.
3) There is no textual or sage support for this method
